clusters.justification: This domain reflects the generalized processing of emotional valences and interoceptive states, anchored in limbic and salience macro-networks for detecting and responding to biologically relevant stimuli.
This domain encapsulates the subjective computation of utility and goal-directed motivation, driven primarily by mesolimbic and cortico-striatal reward circuitry during decision-making.

This domain encompasses internally directed, self-referential, and interpersonal capacities, operating within the default mode network to support complex mental representations of personal history and others' minds.
